privileged_info_summary: The import_csv_transactions task uses fully synthetic data created programmatically in setup_task.sh. The CSV file contains 8 transactions (6 buys, 2 sells) with specific transaction details: AAPL buy of 10 shares at $1855.90, AMZN buy of 20 shares at $3407.00, and AAPL sell of 3 shares at $510.09. All transaction amounts, dates, and share counts precisely match the metadata claims. The securities reference real ISINs: US0378331005 (Apple), US5949181045 (Microsoft), US0231351067 (Amazon), US02079K3059 (Alphabet), and US88160R1014 (Tesla). All metadata claims regarding expected transaction counts (8 total, 6 buys, 2 sells) and specific transaction details have been independently verified against the source script data.
